t.t-foreach: [ {tab:'categories', icon:'fa-tag', label:'Product Categories'}, {tab:'uom', icon:'fa-balance-scale', label:'Units of Measure'}, {tab:'uom_conversion', icon:'fa-exchange', label:'UOM Conversions'}, {tab:'price_lists', icon:'fa-list-alt', label:'Price Book'}, {tab:'products', icon:'fa-cube', label:'Products'} ]

[ {label:'Total Products', val:state.stats.totalProducts, color:'#4361ee', tab:'products'}, {label:'Active Products', val:state.stats.activeProducts, color:'#06d6a0', tab:'products'}, {label:'Categories', val:state.stats.categories, color:'#7209b7', tab:'categories'}, {label:'Active Price Lists', val:state.stats.activePriceLists, color:'#f77f00', tab:'price_lists'}, {label:'Active Batches', val:state.stats.activeBatches, color:'#059669', tab:'batch_master'}, {label:'Near Expiry Batches', val:state.stats.nearExpiryBatches, color:'#f59e0b', tab:'batch_master'}, {label:'Expired Batches', val:state.stats.expiredBatches, color:'#dc2626', tab:'batch_master'}, {label:'Priority Sell Configs',val:state.stats.prioritySellConfigs,color:'#8b5cf6', tab:'priority_sell'}, {label:'Active UOMs', val:state.stats.activeUoms, color:'#4cc9f0', tab:'uom'}, {label:'Conversion Rules', val:state.stats.conversionRules, color:'#f72585', tab:'uom_conversion'} ]

t.div: This table shows configured pricebook priority rules. Lower priority number = higher precedence. Drag to reorder in the Odoo list view.

div.div: Price changes will appear here when logged.

t.div: Users with no category mappings can sell all products. Only assign categories if you want to restrict a user to specific product categories.
Customers with no category mappings can see and order all products. Only assign categories if you want to restrict a customer to specific product categories.

div.div: Select a category above to view its products.

tr.td: No products found in this category.
